original_image_tags: A faded, translucent document page showing a memorandum. The text is mirrored, as if viewed from the reverse side of the paper. The page contains a typed memorandum, several blue ink "RECEIVED" stamps with dates (July 18, 1959) and times (10 08 AM, 8008 PM), and "INDEXED" / "RECORDED" stamps. There is a small, light-colored paper clip or staple artifact at the top center. Faint, illegible red or pink stamps are visible in the left margin. Handwritten text "FBI not interested" or similar is faintly visible in the lower left corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned document page with faint mirrored typed text and multiple ink stamps, including “RECEIVED” and “DEPT OF JUSTICE FBI,” plus a punched hole near the top and handwritten markings in the lower left.*
